_comment: Copy to security-suppressions.json (gitignored) to acknowledge accepted findings so reports surface true signal. View-layer only: removing an entry resurfaces the finding. Match by exact `fingerprint` (from a report) OR a `match` rule (any subset of lane/category/file/severity/title). Optional `expires` (ISO date) auto-deactivates.

suppressions.reason: Home/LAN services are expected to bind to all interfaces
